hero.title: Money Flow Tracker
hero.subtitle: Manage personal finances, expenses, budgets and savings goals with ease and precision.

features.heading: Features
features.sub: A concise overview of what Money Flow Tracker offers — organized by capability.

transaction.title: 1. Comprehensive Transaction Management
items: Income & Expense Tracking: Log amounts, dates, notes and tags for each transaction.
Detailed History: Transactions screen with filtering and search (SearchQuery).
Account-Based Organization: Manage multiple accounts (Bank, Cash, Cards).

budget.title: 2. Smart Budgeting & Goal Setting
items: Budget Planning: Create and edit budgets by category (AddEditBudgetDialog).
Progress Tracking: Visual indicators showing remaining budget.
Financial Goals: Track long-term savings and commitments.

insights.title: 3. Advanced Insights & Analytics
items: Visual Trends: Interactive TrendBarCharts for spending over time.
Category Breakdown: See which categories consume your budget.
Data-Driven Decisions: Use history to identify savings opportunities.

loan.title: 4. Loan & Debt Management
items: Loan Tracking: Manage borrowed/lent money with LoanSettings and DAO support.
Repayment Reminders: Keep track of deadlines and commitments.

categories.title: 5. Personalized Category Management
items: Custom Categories: Create, edit, and delete categories via CategoriesScreen.
Pre-seeded Data: Default categories included for a fast start.

notifications.title: 6. Intelligent Notifications & Reminders
items: Daily Summaries: Receive a daily recap of spending.
Smart Alerts: WorkManager-driven alerts for budget limits and goals.
Core Alerts: High-priority notifications for critical updates.

cloud.title: 7. Cloud Integration & Security
items: Secure Authentication: Firebase Auth and Google Sign-In support.
Real-time Sync: Optional Firebase Database sync across devices.
Enhanced Security: Google reCAPTCHA and Crashlytics for reliability.

premium.title: 8. Premium Experience & Maintenance
items: In-App Purchases: Google Play Billing for premium features.
User Feedback: Built-in FeedbackScreen for suggestions.
Seamless Updates: Google Play App Update API integration.
Modern UI: Built with Jetpack Compose and Material3 (dark-mode ready).

privacy.title: 9. Privacy-First Approach
items: Local Persistence: Room Database as primary on-device storage.
Preference Management: DataStore Preferences for settings and onboarding state.

privacy.subtitle: We take your privacy seriously
privacy.intro: Money Flow Tracker ("MFT", "we", "our", or "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your information. This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected, used, and protected when you use the Money Flow Tracker application.
privacy.collectIntro: The application may collect information that you voluntarily provide, including:
privacy.thirdPartyText: The application may use third-party services that may collect information according to their own privacy policies.
privacy.securityText: We take reasonable measures to protect user information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of electronic storage or transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacy.retentionText: User data is retained only as long as necessary to provide application functionality and comply with applicable legal requirements.
privacy.childrenText: Money Flow Tracker is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
rightsItems: Uninstall the application at any time
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact:

support.subtitle: We're here to help you get the most out of Money Flow Tracker
support.intro: Thank you for using Money Flow Tracker. If you're experiencing any issues, we're here to help!
support.needHelpText: Contact our support team and we'll respond within 48 hours.
tips: Regularly back up your data to avoid losing important information
Categorize transactions properly for better analytics
Set realistic budgets based on your spending patterns
Review your reports monthly to track your financial progress
Use the savings goals feature to stay motivated

delete.subtitle: Request deletion of your Money Flow Tracker account and all associated data.
delete.intro: If you want to delete your Money Flow Tracker account, please follow one of the methods below. We will verify your request and permanently remove your account data within 30 days.
requestItems: Open the Money Flow Tracker app and use the Delete Account option (if available)
delete.includeItem: The email address associated with your account.
dataItems: Cloud backup data stored in Firebase/Firestore
delete.retentionText: Account and associated data are permanently deleted within 30 days of request verification. Certain records may be retained if required by law, security, or fraud-prevention purposes.
delete.contactText: For account deletion requests, email the MFT Core Team at

terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our application
terms.acceptanceText: By using Money Flow Tracker, you agree to these Terms and Conditions in their entirety.
terms.usageText: Money Flow Tracker is provided for personal finance tracking and budgeting purposes only. Users must be at least 13 years old to use this application.
responsibilitiesItems: Keep device credentials and passwords secure
Use the application lawfully and ethically
Do not attempt to bypass security measures or access unauthorized features
Report any suspected security breaches immediately
terms.disclaimerText: Money Flow Tracker does not provide financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. The application is for informational purposes only. Any financial decisions should be made with consultation from qualified professionals.
terms.liabilityIntro: The developer, Nataraja Murthy, shall not be liable for any:
liabilityItems: Financial decisions made using information generated by the application
terms.changesText: These Terms and Conditions may be updated periodically. Users will be notified of significant changes. Continued use of the application after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.lawText: These Terms and Conditions are governed by applicable laws and regulations. Any disputes shall be resolved through appropriate legal channels.
